description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Cold, Occult

You channel the cold of the underworld through your weapon or fist. Make a melee Strike. On a hit, add 1d8 cold damage + 1d8 negative damage to the result. This extra damage affects creatures that would normally be immune to cold or negative damage from non-magical sources.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
